title: catalpa syringifolia
intro: Catalpa syringifolia, also known as the small-flowered catalpa, is a plant species in the bignonia family that is native to China. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Catalpa syringifolia include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves are often dried and used as a tea, or made into a decoction for its medicinal properties.
